title: Duplicate board error with graphQL in Make.com - User Unauthorized or Workspace not exists
excerpt:
Hi everyone! 
So I have a module in Make.com that duplicates a board into an existing workspace using a graphQL mutation query. It was working fine up until today, and I’m not sure what changed.  I keep getting this erro…

posts.author: ErinMR (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

So I have a module in Make.com that duplicates a board into an existing workspace using a graphQL mutation query. It was working fine up until today, and I’m not sure what changed. I keep getting this error:

Screenshot 2023-06-07 at 1.37.22 PM1008×908 80.2 KB

I am an owner on the template board that I’m duplicating, and also created the targeted workspace (where I’m trying to put the duplicated board).

The workspace definitely exists, so I’m pretty stumped.
Any help would be soo appreciated!
Thanks so much in advance

posts.author: ErinMR (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml: Resolved! we needed to add the webhook integration creator as a member to the workspace.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ErinMR,

I am glad you found the fix for this!

Cheers,
Matias
